summary: Iteration 14: Successfully tested @-Mention (Article Linking) feature and verified Zusammenfassung field removal from ArticleView. All 8 backend tests and 23 frontend tests passed.

success_rate.frontend: 100% (23/23 Playwright tests passed across 4 spec files)

seed_data_creation: Test data prefixed with TEST_iter14_ was created and cleaned up during backend tests
context_for_next_testing_agent: All requested features verified working: 1) @-Mention dropdown appears when typing @ in RichTextEditor, 2) Article search API /api/articles/search/linkable works correctly, 3) Selected articles are inserted as clickable mention links, 4) Mention links have correct styling (pink/red background from index.css), 5) Draft status shown in dropdown, 6) ArticleView.jsx has no Zusammenfassung/summary field displayed.

P1_mention_dropdown.notes: Typing @ in RichTextEditor triggers article search and displays dropdown with matching articles

P1_linkable_search_api.notes: GET /api/articles/search/linkable?q=query returns articles with article_id, title, status fields

P1_mention_link_insertion.notes: Selecting an article from dropdown inserts a clickable link with @ArticleTitle format

P1_mention_link_styling.notes: Mention links have .mention-link class with pink/red gradient background and border

P1_summary_field_removed.notes: ArticleView.jsx does not display Zusammenfassung section - content goes directly from metadata to article content

existing_category_tree.notes: Category tree, collapsible folders, and 'Neuer Artikel hier' button all still working

login_system.notes: Cookie-based JWT authentication working with admin credentials

ui_tests_performed.mention_dropdown_results: Dropdown shows matching articles from API
ui_tests_performed.mention_link_insertion: Clicking dropdown item inserts styled mention link
ui_tests_performed.mention_link_styling: Mention links have pink/red background gradient
ui_tests_performed.article_view_no_summary: ArticleView shows content without summary section
ui_tests_performed.article_view_metadata: Title, dates, tags displayed correctly without summary
